summary: SMS Event Logging Bug Fix testing completed. All 11 backend API tests passed. Frontend pages (Touchpoints, Performance, Thread, Contact) all load correctly. The critical bug fix for SMS events not being logged in the performance dashboard is verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: thread/[id].tsx handleSend fix is correctly implemented: awaits API call BEFORE opening native SMS app, with sendBeacon fallback
touchpoints/index.tsx handleCall correctly logs call_placed event before opening dialer
Performance endpoint correctly aggregates all SMS types: sms_sent + sms_personal + personal_sms + sms_failed
seed_data_creation: Created test events (personal_sms, call_placed) for contact ID 69a496841603573df5a41723 during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: SMS event logging bug fix is fully verified. The fix involves: 1) thread/[id].tsx handleSend now awaits API call before opening native SMS app, 2) ensureConversation creates valid conversation ID if needed, 3) sendBeacon fallback for event logging. Performance dashboard shows correct counts: texts=24, calls=7, emails=7 for the week.

backend_apis.POST /api/messages/conversations/{userId: PASS - creates/returns conversation with correct contact_id
backend_apis.POST /api/messages/send/{userId}/{convId: PASS - creates contact_event with personal_sms type
backend_apis.POST /api/contacts/{userId}/{contactId}/: PASS - creates contact_event directly for event logging fallback
backend_apis.GET /api/tasks/{userId}/performance: PASS - counts all SMS types correctly (texts=24)
backend_apis.GET /api/tasks/{userId}/summary: PASS - returns activity stats with texts/calls/emails
backend_apis.GET /api/messages/conversation/{convId}/: PASS - returns contact_id for thread page
backend_apis.Invalid conversation ID: PASS - returns 404 (not 500) for invalid conv ID

frontend_ui.Touchpoints page /touchpoints: VERIFIED - Header visible, scoreboard shows TEXTS/CALLS/EMAILS counts
frontend_ui.Performance page /touchpoints/performanc: VERIFIED - Period tabs, communication stats (24 texts, 7 emails, 7 calls)
frontend_ui.Thread page /thread/{contactId}: VERIFIED - Loads correctly with contact ID, message composer visible
frontend_ui.Contact page /contact/{contactId}: VERIFIED - Shows Bud contact with activity feed showing logged events

bug_fixes_verified.SMS event logging: VERIFIED - contact_events created for sms_personal channel
bug_fixes_verified.Performance dashboard counts: VERIFIED - texts count includes all SMS types
bug_fixes_verified.Thread page with contact ID: VERIFIED - ensureConversation creates conversation from contact ID
bug_fixes_verified.Call event logging: VERIFIED - call_placed event logged from touchpoints page

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - SMS sending goes through native SMS app instead of Twilio API
